positive: A highly stylized and abstract composition featuring a bioluminescent, stylized mountain range silhouette set against a twilight sky. The mountains are sharp, clean, and geometric, made of crystal or glowing flora. The color palette is deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, glowing lilac, and soft gold accents. Minimalist, clean vector art style with deep contrast. The composition is centrally focused, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Highly detailed, crisp lines, gradient fill, ethereal glow effect, trending on Artstation, volumetric lighting, high contrast, maximalist print art.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, amateur, text, watermark, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, lowres
